name: financial-compliance-ledger
description: Immutable audit trail for financial discrepancies with escalation workflows

tools.name: list_discrepancies
tools.description: List discrepancies with optional filters (status, severity, date range)

tools.name: get_discrepancy
tools.description: Get a single discrepancy with its full event timeline

tools.name: resolve_discrepancy
tools.description: Resolve a discrepancy with resolution type

tools.name: add_note
tools.description: Add a note to a discrepancy
